div.div:
Normal interest :-
for late filing of GSTR 3B
from 21/04/20XX
to 07/07/20XX
ie. 78 Days ie 25* 78 = RS 1950
+
Additional interest RS 100 Per Day
Beyond 60 days from BJA order
from 30/06/20XX to 07/07/20XX
ie. 8* 100 = RS 800
